artifact.artifact_title: Research Decision: Model Comparison Calibration Status

claims.text: No calibration evidence is present in the provided records; any conclusion must preserve that limitation.
A result without calibration evidence may support a bounded comparison claim, but it must not be described as calibrated.

artifact.conclusion: The model comparison must not be described as calibrated. No calibration evidence is present in the provided records, and this limitation prevents any claim of calibration. The comparison may support a bounded, non-calibrated claim only.
declared_losses: Calibration evidence is absent from the provided records. Any description of the model comparison as calibrated is unsupported.
artifact.recommended_action: Describe the model comparison using bounded language that does not assert or imply calibration. Explicitly disclose the absence of calibration evidence and confine any comparative claim to qualified, non-calibrated terms.

request.instruction: Use only the provided evidence records. Preserve any limitation that affects whether the comparison may be described as calibrated. The recommendation must be constrained by that limitation.

content.text: No calibration evidence is present in the provided records. Any conclusion must preserve that limitation.
A result without calibration evidence may support a bounded comparison claim, but it must not be described as calibrated.
Unrelated note about visual spacing in a dashboard.

request.task: Write a short research decision note deciding whether a model comparison may be described as calibrated.
